title: Funnasting Metallic Marker Pens, 20 Colors Metallic Pens Paint Pen Art Markers for Card Making, DIY Photo Album, Scrapbooking, Stone, Glass, Plastic, Metal, Wood (Not suitable for Children)
features: BRILLIANT METALLIC COLORS -- 20 colors metallic pens have a brilliant metallic finish, the vibrant and attractive metallic luster adding a sparkle embellishment to your craft work. Not suitable for children under 14 years of age.
SMOOTH WRITING -- Metallic markers come with 2mm fine tip, wearable and durable, glide effortlessly across the page, easy to control, making smooth clear lines.
SAFE INK -- Made of water-based ink, acid-free and non-toxic. Ink flows well, quick-drying after writing, without smear or bleed through paper, bring a good writing experience.

WIDE APPLICATIONS -- Metallic paint pens can be widely used on any surface like black card, paper, plastic, glass, stone, ceramics, metal, wood etc. A wonderful choose for card marking, DIY photo albums, scrapbook, wedding craft, adult coloring books.

PERFECT DESIGN -- This product is metallic pen, suitable for use by adults.The colored pen cover makes it easy to find colors, rounded pen body ensures comfort even when you work with them for a long time. Besides, each pen has a clip that is very convenient to carry.
